title: PM Tasks Contract
description: PM -> Director contract. Goal/acceptance fields are immutable during execution; evidence may be appended.

tasks.title: Add AI context files
tasks.goal: Create .ai-agent context artifacts for faster agent onboarding

schema_version.description: Schema version. v2 is the current contract; v1 is accepted for backward compatibility.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this PM run (links artifacts and events).

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp of PM contract emission.

overall_goal.description: The overarching goal for this iteration.

policy_overrides.description: Global policy overrides for this run (optional).

engine.description: Optional engine execution hints for PM->Director orchestration.

director_execution_mode.description: Director execution mode. multi is forward-compatible and may degrade to single in older runtimes.

max_directors.description: Upper bound of Director workers when mode=multi.

scheduling_policy.description: Task scheduling policy used by polaris-engine.

tasks.description: Ordered list of tasks in this contract.

id.description: Stable task identifier within the PM contract.

priority.description: Task priority. Lower numbers mean higher urgency (e.g. P0).

status.description: Task lifecycle status in PM queue.

goal.description: Immutable objective for this task. Director must not modify.
examples: Refactor io_utils to improve error traceability

dependencies.description: Task IDs that must complete before this task starts.

parallel_group.description: Optional group token for tasks that may run in parallel.

capability.description: Optional capability routing hint for Director worker selection.

execution_mode.description: Director execution mode. strict=follow blueprint exactly, standard=allow some flexibility, creative=allow autonomous decisions within constraints.

director_level.description: Required Director capability level. L1=weak local model (strict only), L2=standard local model, L3=strong model (creative allowed).

shardable.description: Whether the task can be sharded/parallelized by engine.

max_parallel_hint.description: Optional upper bound hint for parallel sharding of this task.

spec.description: Optional implementation spec pointer or embedded spec object.

constraints.description: Hard constraints or prohibitions for this task.

target_files.description: Exact file list for strict lock mode (`scope_mode=exact_files`). Optional in module scope mode.

scope_mode.description: Write-scope strategy. `module` is default and prefers directory/module prefixes via `scope_paths`.

scope_paths.description: Module/directory prefixes allowed for Director writes. Used when `scope_mode=module`.

acceptance.description: Acceptance criteria strings used by QA. Immutable during execution.

acceptance_criteria.description: Canonical acceptance criteria alias (equivalent to acceptance).

oneOf.description: Legacy v1 format. Treated as validation_paths.

validation_paths.description: Validation-only artifact/file paths used by QA/Auditor after execution.

oneOf.description: v2 format. VALIDATION-ONLY for Director tasks: this field must not contain read/search instructions and must not be used to drive Director context collection.

required_evidence.description: Validation metadata only. Director must infer context from workspace and task contract, not from required_evidence.

qa_contract.description: Post-Director QA adjudication contract consumed by Engine-side Auditor plugin.

source.description: Contract source marker such as pm_contract or auto_compat.

plugin.description: QA plugin identifier. rules_v1 is the built-in deterministic rules engine.

plugin_hint.description: Optional PM/Router hint for QA acceptance route selection (e.g. playwright, pytest_api).

task_type.description: Task category used for plugin routing (e.g. backend_api, ui_canvas).

hard_gates.description: Goal-related gates. Any failed hard gate causes FAIL.

regression_gates.description: Regression gates. Any failed regression gate causes FAIL.

evidence_required.description: Required evidence keys/paths. Missing evidence causes INCONCLUSIVE.

coordination.description: Tri-Council coordination policy used when tasks are complex or QA is non-pass.

backlog_ref.description: Original backlog item text from plan.md that this task derives from. Empty string if unknown.

error_code.description: Machine-readable error code from the last Director failure. Present only when status is failed or blocked.

failure_detail.description: Human-readable failure description. Present only when status is failed or blocked.

failed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the task entered failed/blocked state.
